n: Intro: Remedy of the Old Kings

steps.t: Captain Brackenbrook is near The Mad Badger Inn in the village of Archet. You should ask the Captain if he knows of any kingsfoil plants nearby and al…
Calder Cob is at a farm outside of Archet, on the way to Bronwe's Folly as you take the road south from the town. Kingsfoil can be found at Bronwe's F…
Strider is in the town of Archet, awaiting your return with leaves and news of your efforts to get Brackenbrook to trust you. You should bring Strider…
